_meta.dataset: Wind Software & Services China — active companies

globally_absent_metrics.current_liabilities: Not present in Wind export at all — need to search for ALL companies × ALL years 2014-2024
globally_absent_metrics.total_debt: Promised but not exported — need to search for ALL companies × ALL years 2014-2024
globally_absent_metrics.net_income: Column exported but 100% empty (Wind field mismatch: anal_reits_netprofit) — need to search for ALL companies × ALL years 2014-2024

notes.cash_beginning: Raw file has only beginning-of-period cash. End-of-2024 cash must be searched separately.
notes.short_term_loans: Present but NOT a substitute for current_liabilities — also globally underfilled (~30-50% coverage).
